properties.displayName: Cross Workspace Test - AAD non-interactive sign-ins observed
properties.description: テスト目的の分析ルールです。sentinel-eus2 から spoke-sentinel1 をクロスワークスペース参照し、両ワークスペースに直近 24 時間の AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs が存在する場合にアラートとインシデントを生成します。検証完了後は無効化してください。
properties.query:
let Lookback = 24h;
let SignIns =
union isfuzzy=true
(
    AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(Lookback)
    | where isnotempty(UserPrincipalName)
    | extend SourceWorkspace = 'sentinel-eus2'
),
(
    workspace('1f1f7c40-4bb1-454b-a124-c104d400069b').AADNonInteractiveUserSignInLogs
    | where TimeGenerated > ago(Lookback)
    | where isnotempty(UserPrincipalName)
    | extend SourceWorkspace = 'spoke-sentinel1'
);
SignIns
| summarize WorkspaceCount = dcount(SourceWorkspace), Workspaces = make_set(SourceWorkspace), SignInCount = count(), Users = make_set(UserPrincipalName, 10), Apps = make_set(AppDisplayName, 10), IPAddresses = make_set(IPAddress, 10), ResultTypes = make_set(tostring(ResultType), 10), ConditionalAccessStatuses = make_set(tostring(ConditionalAccessStatus), 10), FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated), LastSeen = max(TimeGenerated), SampleUserPrincipalName = any(UserPrincipalName), SampleIPAddress = any(IPAddress), SampleAppDisplayName = any(AppDisplayName), SampleResultType = any(tostring(ResultType))
| where WorkspaceCount >= 2 and SignInCount >= 2
| extend TimeGenerated = LastSeen
| extend TestScenario = 'Cross workspace AAD non-interactive sign-in validation', HubWorkspace = 'sentinel-eus2', SpokeWorkspaceName = 'spoke-sentinel1', WorkspacesObserved = strcat_array(Workspaces, ','), AccountName = tostring(split(SampleUserPrincipalName, '@')[0]), UPNSuffix = tostring(split(SampleUserPrincipalName, '@')[1]), UserSample = tostring(Users), AppSample = tostring(Apps), IPSample = tostring(IPAddresses), ResultTypeSample = tostring(ResultTypes), ConditionalAccessStatusSample = tostring(ConditionalAccessStatuses)
| project TimeGenerated, TestScenario, HubWorkspace, SpokeWorkspaceName, WorkspacesObserved, WorkspaceCount, SignInCount, UserSample, SampleUserPrincipalName, AccountName, UPNSuffix, SampleIPAddress, SampleAppDisplayName, SampleResultType, AppSample, IPSample, ResultTypeSample, ConditionalAccessStatusSample, FirstSeen, LastSeen

alertDetailsOverride.alertDescriptionFormat: AAD non-interactive sign-in data was found in both sentinel-eus2 and spoke-sentinel1. Sign-in count: {{SignInCount}}, sample app: {{SampleAppDisplayName}}, sample IP: {{SampleIPAddress}}.
